description_long: This object is a modern, compact shotgun with a sleek, angular design and a predominantly dark gray body accented by thin, light-colored lines that create a subtle geometric pattern. The barrel is cylindrical and extends forward, appearing to be fitted with a suppressor or muzzle device. The grip is integrated into the main body and features a red panel, providing both visual contrast and likely improved grip. The trigger and trigger guard are visible beneath the main body, with the guard having a slightly angular, squared-off shape. The overall form is streamlined, with no visible external magazine or pump mechanism, suggesting a simplified or futuristic design. The surface finish appears matte with minimal gloss, and the construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials.
description: A compact, angular shotgun with a dark gray body, red grip accents, and a cylindrical barrel, featuring a matte finish and geometric surface lines.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, the red grip panel, and the cylindrical barrel with a possible suppressor.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow, streamlined profile of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the red grip panel and the continuous geometric pattern across the body.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the grip and the overall slimness of the shotgun's design.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: squared, medium-sized trigger guard with angular edges and no visible finger grooves
